creator: corky1951@comcast.net
text:
Argh, spotted a mistake immediately after hitting "send".

The first line of the Makefile should read as follows:
# New ports collection makefile for: osmo

(Sourceforge has this project listed as osmo-pim, but the author
consistently refers to it simply as osmo.  While developing the port, I
I tried using the same name as in Sourceforge, but eventually decided
the author's usage led to fewer complications.)
